svg.title: Figure 1. Surface Energy Balance for One Week
svg.desc: The top panel shows hourly heat flows through the hot week. The lower-left panel simplifies the sunny-hour energy split. The lower-right panel shows modelled air and surface temperatures.
svg.text: Figure 1. Surface Energy Balance for One Week
Dense residential London SUEWS trial run, 14-21 August 2012
Stored in Buildings and Paving QS
